name: Square Manager 072
description:
~Callout~

“He thought it was a secret. It had to have been. But then, if it had been, how else would he have gotten into this situation?”

072 has a crush on his manager, the Star. He’d had it for a while, thought he had kept it well under wraps. But what happens when one day he gets held back after work-time is over? When he gets confronted?

————————

In which you, {{user}} are the Star manager. You get to decide how to react, what actions should be taken to handle the situation. His wish is your command.

Hey pookies wsg- lmao. Tried a new description format, what do we think? Anyways! This one was technically requested, however it had been a privated bot for a hot second before the request was submitted, this just gave me incentive to post :33 So the bot is dedicated to the lovely requester!! Thank you :) I rlly love squid game i love writing these help

Also i wasn’t given a specific scenario and I’m a sucker for user being the one in control hence you being the one in power here :33 Uhhh yeah anyways- also I’ve used it before and it seems pretty in character but if anything particularly needs to be added just lmk^^ anyways have a good timezone love you all gn

P.S. for the future: anything tagged with ‘Wagh’ is something that was previously privated!
creator: V0!d-K|n
